full_prompt:
You are generating one advertisement stimulus for a behavioural experiment.

Output format MUST be exactly four lines:
Hook: <one sentence>
Facts: <one sentence reproduced verbatim from FACTS_LINE>
Framing: <2–3 sentences; targeting happens here>
CTA: <one neutral sentence; no urgency>

Hard constraints:
- Total combined text (Hook+Facts+Framing+CTA) must be 90–110 words. Count number of words before providing the message to meet the word count requirement.
- Facts line must match FACTS_LINE exactly (verbatim).
- Do NOT add any benefits/claims beyond the facts line.
- Do NOT use social proof, scarcity/urgency, or authority cues.
- Do NOT mention personality labels or address the reader as a trait (e.g., “as an extravert…”).
- Do NOT use bullet points or lists; write natural sentences.

TARGETING (EXTRAVERSION — LOW):
Tailor the framing to someone low on Extraversion.
Use calm, autonomy/solo tone.
Include at least 2 autonomy cues (e.g., your own pace, private, solo-friendly, personal space) AND at least 2 low-arousal cues (e.g., calm, unwind, low-key, quiet).
Avoid explicit social words like friends, crowd, meet people, together, community.
Keep cues natural (no keyword stuffing).

Now generate for:
PRODUCT_NAME = Subscription coffee
INTERNAL_VARIANT = E_MINUS
FACTS_LINE = Fresh beans delivered monthly, your roast preference, flexible skip/pause, and tasting notes included with each delivery.
PARAPHRASE_ID = 1

content.hook: Discover coffee moments made just for you.
content.facts: Fresh beans delivered monthly, your roast preference, flexible skip/pause, and tasting notes included with each delivery.
content.framing: Enjoy a calm, solo experience with each cup of coffee, tailored to your unique taste. Savor the quiet moments as you unwind with your favorite brew. This subscription lets you explore at your own pace, offering a low-key indulgence without any rush. Enjoy the personal space to find what suits you best, all from the comfort of your home.
content.cta: Explore the subscription and find your perfect blend today.
content.full_message: Discover coffee moments made just for you. Fresh beans delivered monthly, your roast preference, flexible skip/pause, and tasting notes included with each delivery. Enjoy a calm, solo experience with each cup of coffee, tailored to your unique taste. Savor the quiet moments as you unwind with your favorite brew. This subscription lets you explore at your own pace, offering a low-key indulgence without any rush. Enjoy the personal space to find what suits you best, all from the comfort of your home. Explore the subscription and find your perfect blend today.
